title: Prawns Ceviche Recipe
description: A classic Venezuelan dish featuring marinated prawns in a tangy and refreshing ceviche sauce. This recipe is quick, easy, and perfect for a light meal.

ingredients.name: prawns (shrimp)
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, peeled and deveined

ingredients.name: ceviche
ingredients.notes: store-bought or homemade, see below for recipe

instructions: Rinse the prawns under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, combine the prawns, ceviche, lime juice, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to combine, being careful not to overmix.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, check the prawns for doneness. They should be opaque and firm to the touch.
Serve the ceviche immediately, garnished with additional lime wedges if desired.
If using salty, sprinkle it over the ceviche just before serving.
